scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @gioia/dto run build && pnpm -r --parallel run dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gioia/dto run build && pnpm -r run build
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @gioia/dto run build && pnpm --filter @gioia/web run dev
scripts.dev:api: pnpm --filter @gioia/dto run build && pnpm --filter @gioia/api run dev
scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter @gioia/dto run build && pnpm --filter @gioia/web run build
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @gioia/dto run build && pnpm --filter @gioia/api run build
